quality.rationale: 直接缩并求迹步骤简短，但有明确电磁场物理背景且解答完整

origin.question: Problem 4.16. Show that the stress-energy tensor for the electromagnetic field has zero trace.
origin.solution:
Solution 4.16. From the stress-energy $\mathbf{T}^{\mu \nu} = (1 / 4\pi)(\mathbf{F}^{\mu a}\mathbf{F}^{\nu}_{a} - \frac{1}{4}\eta^{\mu \nu}\mathbf{F}_{a} eta \mathbf{F}^{\alpha \beta})$ the trace is easily computed to be
$$
\mathbf {T}_{\mu}^{\mu} = (1 / 4 \pi ) ( \mathbf {F}^{\mu \alpha} \mathbf {F}_{\mu \alpha} - \frac {1}{4} \cdot 4 \cdot \mathbf {F}_{\alpha \beta} \mathbf {F}^{\alpha \beta} ) = 0 .
$$
